title: Stará Ľubovňa Heavy Rain
lead: A critical weather event is unfolding in Stará Ľubovňa with heavy rain. The Z-Score of -3.06 indicates a significant anomaly.
body:
The current weather conditions in Stará Ľubovňa are characterized by heavy rain, with a Score of 10.0/10 and a Level of CRITICAL. 
 The HDD value of 11.7 GG and CDD value of 0.0 GG indicate a significant impact on heating demands. 
 The high Umidita of 91% and moderate Vento of 10.8 km/h are exacerbating the situation.
